use_cases: Create animated gradient backgrounds for hero sections on landing pages
Add dynamic shader-based backgrounds to SaaS dashboards
Render grain-textured warm gradient effects for full-page layouts
Enhance visual appeal of web applications with customizable color schemes
ai_summary: A shader-based gradient background component using Paper Design Shaders that renders an animated, grain-textured gradient with a warm orange-yellow-magenta color palette against a dark backdrop. Features customizable parameters including softness, intensity, shape, animation speed, and color stops. This GPU-accelerated background component is suitable for creating visually striking hero sections and landing page backgrounds in web applications.
